name: buyme-local
description: Local marketplace for the BuyMe concierge plugin, registered from the buyme-mcp repo clone.

plugins.name: buyme
plugins.description: BuyMe gift-card concierge: search redeemable Israeli businesses, vet redemption terms/hours/multi-voucher acceptance, and manage your BuyMe wallet. Bundles the buyme MCP server, a concierge skill, and slash commands.
